rows.label: qev090604_MSG0001
rows.name:
Xenos are rotten to their
bones. Every last one of them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090604_MSG0002
rows.name:
I hope I never so much as
have to look at one again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090604_MSG0003
rows.name: Now...let's do what we came to do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090604_MSG0004
rows.name:
Namo Amitabhaya! That monster
put up a respectable fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090604_MSG0005
rows.name:
We had our share of detours,
but the job is done.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090604_MSG0006
rows.name: Let's head back and give Eleonora our report.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090604_MSG0008
rows.name: Did that Ma-non save our lives with this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090604_MSG0010
rows.name:
It matters not now. Let's
focus on the mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090604_MSG0011
rows.name:
I won't allow myself to be
distracted because of some xeno.[ST:wait ]
